html:
Exclusive to:

Roe are a Meat Food Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They are left on the Ocean by Cormorants and can also be obtained by using a Trawl Net. Roe restore 1 and 4.6875 when eaten and take 3 Days to Spoil.

Roe can be Cooked in the Crock Pot, and counts as 0.5 units of Meat and 1 unit of Fish. Cooking Roe on a Fire will yield Cooked Roe. It can also be used to stock a Fish Farm.

Fish Chance

When used to stock Fish Farms, Roe has the following chances of growing into these fish types:

Item Name Chance
from Roe
Tropical Fish 50.0%
Purple Grouper 16.6%
Pierrot Fish 16.6%
Neon Quattro 16.6%

Tips

  • Using a Trawl Net in shallow water during Mild or Monsoon Season has a good chance of yielding Roe.
  • Wearing a Feather Hat while sailing in shallow waters or near bird spawns (marked by a Seagull icon on the map) will increase the chance of Cormorants landing and dropping Roe. Feather hats can be won from the Slot Machine or crafted using Tentacle Spots dropped from the Quacken’s tentacles.

Trivia

  • Roe was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.

Gallery

  • Roe as seen in the poster for the Home Sea Home update.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“Fish babies.”
–Wilson, when examining Roe.
“Ughh! That's nasty!!”
–Willow, when examining Roe.
“Is eggy.”
–Wolfgang, when examining Roe.
“The beginnings of life...”
–Wendy, when examining Roe.
“POTENTIAL AQUATIC INFERIORS”
–WX-78, when examining Roe.
“The first stage in the fish life cycle.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Roe.
“A handful of future fish, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining Roe.
“Raw fish eggs. Fantastic.”
–Maxwell, when examining Roe.
“Presumably, fish will hatch from this ovum.”
–Wagstaff, when examining Roe.
“One day you may be true meat.”
–Wigfrid, when examining Roe.
“These aren't spider eggs.”
–Webber, when examining Roe.
“Roe, roe, roe my board... I'm going nuts out here.”
–Walani, when examining Roe.
“I can make caviar with canapes!”
–Warly, when examining Roe.
“Egg'o'th'fish.”
–Woodlegs, when examining Roe.
“'TIS FISHY EGGIES”
–Wilba, when examining Roe.
“Baby Glub Glubs”
–Wormwood, when examining Roe.
“Baby fish. Just waiting to hatch.”
–Wheeler, when examining Roe.
“Roe, sunny side up.”
–Wilson, when examining Cooked Roe.
“I cooked them, but they're still nasty.”
–Willow, when examining Cooked Roe.
“Little eggs is stink less now.”
–Wolfgang, when examining Cooked Roe.
“I spared them the pain of hatching.”
–Wendy, when examining Cooked Roe.
“THEY WERE VULNERABLE AND I DESTROYED THEM. HAHAHA”
–WX-78, when examining Cooked Roe.
“The first and last stages of this life cycle.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Cooked Roe.
“Better eat'em before they go bad.”
–Woodie, when examining Cooked Roe.
“The fish eggs are cooked now.”
–Maxwell, when examining Cooked Roe.
“The act of cooking has organized the roe into rows. Curious...”
–Wagstaff, when examining Cooked Roe.
“You shall never be true meat now.”
–Wigfrid, when examining Cooked Roe.
“Not the kind of eggs we're used to.”
–Webber, when examining Cooked Roe.
“At least they didn't have faces.”
–Walani, when examining Cooked Roe.
“Could use a squeeze of fresh lemon.”
–Warly, when examining Cooked Roe.
“Roast egg'o'th'fish.”
–Woodlegs, when examining Cooked Roe.
“FWOOSH'D FISHY EGGIES”
–Wilba, when examining Cooked Roe.
“Tidy rows”
–Wormwood, when examining Cooked Roe.
“Look how nicely they lined up.”
–Wheeler, when examining Cooked Roe.
Roe are a Meat Food Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They are left on the Ocean by Cormorants and can also be obtained by using a Trawl Net. Roe restore 1 and 4.6875 when eaten and take 3 Days to Spoil.
Roe can be Cooked in the Crock Pot, and counts as 0.5 units of Meat and 1 unit of Fish. Cooking Roe on a Fire will yield Cooked Roe. It can also be used to stock a Fish Farm.

Tips[edit | edit source]
Using a Trawl Net in shallow water during Mild or Monsoon Season has a good chance of yielding Roe.
Wearing a Feather Hat while sailing in shallow waters or near bird spawns (marked by a Seagull icon on the map) will increase the chance of Cormorants landing and dropping Roe. Feather hats can be won from the Slot Machine or crafted using Tentacle Spots dropped from the Quacken’s tentacles.

Roe was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Trứng Trứng là một Thực Phẩm Thịt được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Chúng bị Chim cốc bỏ lại trên Đại dương và cũng có thể thu được bằng cách sử dụng Lưới kéo. Roe hồi phục 1 và 4,6875 khi ăn và mất 3 ngày để hư hỏng.
